--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the information I was looking for. In the consolidated balance sheet (合并资产负债表) of 东阿阿胶股份有限公司 (Dong-E-E-Jiao Co., Ltd.) for the period ending March 31, 2024, I can see:

"使用权资产 39,334,577.43 44,460,859.95"

This shows:
- 期末余额 (Ending balance): 39,334,577.43 yuan
- 期初余额 (Beginning balance): 44,460,859.95 yuan

The question asks for the right-of-use assets (使用权资产) value. The current/ending balance is 39,334,577.43 yuan.

I have found the evidence needed to answer the question. I should now stop and provide the answer with the verbatim text from the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the right-of-use assets value in the balance sheet"}</search>
<answer>["使用权资产 39,334,577.43 44,460,859.95"]</answer>
